Stuart's Advice Surgery

  • Tweet

Please contact me at [email protected] with any enquiries, or by using the button below.

I hold regular advice surgeries for constituents across the Daventry constituency and aim to make these as accessible as possible.

Upcoming advice surgery dates for 2026:

  • Saturday 16 May - Long Buckby Ward
  • Saturday 20 June - Rural North East Ward

    Dates to be confirmed nearer the time
     
  • Saturday July - Woodford & Weedon Ward
  • Saturday August - Daventry Town
  • Saturday September - Moulton Ward
  • Saturday October - Campion Ward
  • Saturday November - Earls Barton Ward
  • Saturday December - Braunston & Crick Ward

If you would like to meet to discuss any concerns, either at one of the scheduled surgeries or at another time, please do get in touch. I am always happy to work with constituents to ensure I am as available to you as possible.
 

CONTACT ME

Stuart Andrew MP Member of Parliament for the Daventry Constituency
